name: ai-thinking
title: AI Thinking
description: Non-blocking assistant working status with a plain-language phase label and an optional stop slot.

props.name: phase
props.description: Plain-language description of what the product is doing right now.

props.name: variant
props.description: `bubble` sits in a transcript next to messages; `inline` sits under a composer or in a toolbar.

props.name: action
props.description: Trailing slot for a caller-owned stop/cancel control.

clinicalNotes: Phase copy describes system work ("Retrieving approved sources"), not cognition — never "thinking clinically", "considering differentials", or anything that implies the system is reasoning about the patient. Clinicians calibrate trust from this wording. The status is aria-live="polite" and the spinner is motion-safe, so it neither interrupts a screen-reader user mid-sentence nor animates for someone who has asked for reduced motion. It is non-blocking by design: a clinician must always be able to keep working in the chart while a turn is in flight.
notes: Differs from ai-typing-indicator: this names a processing phase; the indicator only shows conversational turn state.
